chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 512 of 2025 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 27.02.2025 Mr. Arshad M. Tayebally, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Nadir Khan Burdi and Dhani Bux, advocates for SBCA Mr. Taimoor Ali Mirza, advocate for alleged contemnor No.5 Messrs. Malik Altaf Hussain and Moin Sandeelo, advocates for respondent No.5 Mr. Abdul Qayoom Abbasi, advocate for respondent No.5 Messrs Shamail Sikandar and Syed Zaeem Hyder, advocates for respondent No.6 Mr. Sandeep Malani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh Mr. Khurram Ghayas advocate for KMC Mr. Muhammad Ishaque Khuhro, DG SBCA Mr. Altaf Gohar, DG, KDA Mr. Rasheed Solangi, Ex-DG KDA Mr. Naeem Ahmed Mughal, D.G. Sindh E.P.A. Dr. Habib-ur-Rehman Solangi, Deputy Director Law Sindh EPA Mr. Muhammad Imran Sabir, Director Natural Resources Sindh EPA Mr. Abdullah Magsi, Director Lab Sindh EPA DSP Nisar Ahmed.SDPO, Police Station New Town Mr. Shamail Sikandar advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of alleged contemnor No.2, which is taken on record. Compliance reports, reply to the contempt application and counter affidavit have been filed, taken on record. This petition sought a restraint upon perpetuation of illegal commercial activity upon Plot no.76 Old Clifton Karachi; admittedly residential premises. The learned counsel for the respondent nos. 5 & 6 submit, upon instructions, that the said respondents shall not use the subject residential property for any illegal / unsanctioned purpose and / or for any purpose contrary to the terms of its allotment / lease.

This petition sought a restraint upon perpetuation of illegal commercial activity upon Plot no.76 Old Clifton Karachi; admittedly residential premises. The learned counsel for the respondent nos. 5 & 6 submit, upon instructions, that the said respondents shall not use the subject residential property for any illegal / unsanctioned purpose and / or for any purpose contrary to the terms of its allotment / lease. The DG SBCA, DG KDA, and learned counsel representing the said and remaining respondents, undertake that they shall ensure that the subject residential property is not used for any illegal / unsanctioned purpose and / or for any purpose contrary to the terms of its allotment / lease. Learned counsel for the petitioner states that it may be just and proper for the petition to be allowed in terms aforesaid. No cavil is articulated in such regard. Order accordingly. The contempt notices and warrants, issued herein, stand hereby discharged. Judge Judge Amjad
